text.title: AI Code-Review Impact Suggestion Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: extract-changed-modules
step.action: Map changed files to graph nodes; compute transitive consumers.

step.name: compute-coverage-delta
step.action: Compute uncovered branches per impacted module.

step.name: draft-comment
step.action: LLM drafts comment; prepend ai_drafted line.

step.name: validate-and-post
step.action: Run validate-ai-cr-impact-suggestion.py; post; await named reviewer.
